ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the contact */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the address belongs to */,
  "street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streets" (
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the street belongs to */,
  "street_type" TEXT /* Type of street (e.g., Avenue, Boulevard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streets_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the postal code belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address the household belongs to */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the household belongs to */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "household_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the member belongs to */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the member is */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the member to the household (e.g., parent, child) */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the member joined the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_history" (
  "contact_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact history entry */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the contact information was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "address_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address history entry */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address the entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the address information was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., street, city) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the role in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
